sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72796" key="o)ktah/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτα-ήμερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eight days old,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Phil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
